title: psychotria fragrans
intro: Psychotria fragrans, also known as fragrant wild coffee, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psychotria fragrans include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink, or sometimes used in traditional remedies as a paste or poultice.
